{
  "days": [
    {
      "day": 1,
      "title": "Kavna kultura",
      "focus": "Basic coffee ordering",
      "collocations": ["Kavno, prosim", "Črna kava", "Bela kava"],
      "learning_objective": "Order a simple coffee",
      "story_guidance": "Learner enters a busy café in Ljubljana"
    },
    {
      "day": 2,
      "title": "Izbor kave",
      "focus": "Coffee type selection",
      "collocations": ["Espresso", "Kapučino", "Kava z mlekom"],
      "learning_objective": "Specify coffee type when ordering",
      "story_guidance": "Learner asks for recommendations at a coffee shop"
    },
    {
      "day": 3,
      "title": "Količina in velikost",
      "focus": "Quantity and size specification",
      "collocations": ["Veliko", "Majhno", "Dvojno"],
      "learning_objective": "Specify quantity and size of coffee",
      "story_guidence": "Learner orders coffee for themselves and a friend"
    },
    {
      "day": 4,
      "title": "Sladkor in smetana",
      "focus": "Adding sugar and cream",
      "collocations": ["Sladkor, prosim", "Smetana, prosim", "Brez sladkorja"],
      "learning_objective": "Request sugar and cream with coffee",
      "story_guidance": "Learner customizes their coffee order"
    },
    {
      "day": 5,
      "title": "Plačilo in napitnina",

      "story_guidance": "Learner pays for their coffee and leaves a tip"
    },
    {
      "day": 6,
      "title": "Napake in popravki",
      "focus": "Correcting mistakes in orders",
      "collocations": ["Izvinite", "Žal mi je", "To sem naročil napačno"],
      "learning_objective": "Correct mistakes when ordering coffee",
      "story_guidance": "Learner makes a mistake with their order and corrects it"
    },
    {
      "day": 7,
      "title": "Spremljajoči izdelek",
      "focus": "Ordering pastries or snacks with coffee",
      "collocations": ["Krofen", "Kreemna rezina", "Sendvič"],
      "learning_objective": "Order a pastry or snack to accompany coffee",
      "story_guidance": "Learner orders a coffee and a pastry to go"
    }
  ]
}

{
  "title": "Ordering Coffee in Ljubljana",
  "key_phrases": [
    {"phrase": "Želim kavo", "translation": "I would like a coffee"},
    {"phrase": "Kako kavo imate?", "translation": "What kind of coffee do you have?"},
    {"phrase": "Kavno pivo, prosim", "translation": "A coffee beer, please"},
    {"phrase": "Želim vročo kavo", "translation": "I would like a hot coffee"},
    {"phrase": "Koliko stane?", "translation": "How much does it cost?"},
    {"phrase": "Ali imate sladko kavo?", "translation": "Do you have sweet coffee?"}
  ],
  "scenes": [
    {
      "label": "At the Café Counter",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Živelite, kaj boste?", "translation": "Hello, what will you have?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Želim kavo, prosim.", "translation": "I would like a coffee, please."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Kako kavo imate?", "translation": "What kind of coffee do you have?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Imamo kavno pivo, kapučino in espresso.", "translation": "We have coffee beer, cappuccino, and espresso."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Kavno pivo, prosim.", "translation": "A coffee beer, please."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Želim vročo kavo.", "translation": "I would like a hot coffee."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Koliko stane?", "translation": "How much does it cost?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Stane 2,50 evra.", "translation": "It costs 2.50 euros."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Ali imate sladko kavo?", "translation": "Do you have sweet coffee?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Da, imamo sladko kavo.", "translation": "Yes, we have sweet coffee."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Prosim, eno sladko kavo.", "translation": "Please, one sweet coffee."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Asking for Sugar",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Kaj pa vi? Bi kaj še?", "translation": "What about you? Would you like something else?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Ja, seveda. Še eno kavno pivo, prosim.", "translation": "Yes, of course. Another coffee beer, please."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Evo, vaša kava. Prosim.", "translation": "Here is your coffee. Please."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Hvala lepa.", "translation": "Thank you very much."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Saj vem, da je dobra kava.", "translation": "I know that it's good coffee."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Ja, res je.", "translation": "Yes, it is."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Koliko stane?", "translation": "How much does it cost?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Stane 5 evrov.", "translation": "It costs 5 euros."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Mhm, ok.", "translation": "Mhm, ok."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Paying the Bill",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Kaj pa vi? Bi plačali?", "translation": "What about you? Will you pay?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Ja, seveda. Plačil bom.", "translation": "Yes, of course. I will pay."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Koliko stane?", "translation": "How much does it cost?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Stane 7,50 evrov.", "translation": "It costs 7.50 euros."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Prosim, vaša menjalna.", "translation": "Please, your change."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Hvala lepa.", "translation": "Thank you very much."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Najlepša hvala.", "translation": "You're welcome."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Nasvidenje.", "translation": "Goodbye."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Ordering Another Coffee",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Kaj pa vi? Bi še eno kavo?", "translation": "What about you? Would you like another coffee?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Ja, seveda. Želim še eno kavo.", "translation": "Yes, of course. I would like another coffee."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Kako kavo imate?", "translation": "What kind of coffee do you have?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Imamo kavno pivo, kapučino in espresso.", "translation": "We have coffee beer, cappuccino, and espresso."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Kavno pivo, prosim.", "translation": "A coffee beer, please."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Želim vročo kavo.", "translation": "I would like a hot coffee."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Koliko stane?", "translation": "How much does it cost?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Stane 2,50 evra.", "translation": "It costs 2.50 euros."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Ali imate sladko kavo?", "translation": "Do you have sweet coffee?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Da, imamo sladko kavo.", "translation": "Yes, we have sweet coffee."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Leaving the Café",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Kaj pa vi? Bi odšli?", "translation": "What about you? Will you leave?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Ja, seveda. Odidem.", "translation": "Yes, of course. I will leave."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Nasvidenje.", "translation": "Goodbye."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Nasvidenje.", "translation": "Goodbye."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Saj vem, da se bomo spet srečali.", "translation": "I know that we will meet again."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Ja, res je.", "translation": "Yes, it is."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Mhm, ok.", "translation": "Mhm, ok."},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Ja, seveda.", "translation": "Yes, of course."}
      ]
    }
  ],
  "dialogue_glosses": [

    {"lemma": "kaj", "translation": "what"},

{
  "title": "Ordering Coffee at a Busy Café",
  "key_phrases": [
    {"phrase": "Jeg vil gjerne en kaffe", "translation": "I would like a coffee"},
    {"phrase": "En espresso takk", "translation": "An espresso, please"},
    {"phrase": "Kaffen er for varm", "translation": "The coffee is too hot"},
    {"phrase": "Jeg tar sukkerpilen", "translation": "I'll take the sugar packet"},
    {"phrase": "En cappuccino bitte", "translation": "A cappuccino, please"}
  ],
  "scenes": [
    {
      "label": "At the Counter",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Hei, hva kan jeg hjelpe deg med?", "translation": "Hi, what can I help you with?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Jeg vil gjerne en kaffe, takk.", "translation": "I would like a coffee, please."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "En espresso eller en vanlig kaffe?", "translation": "An espresso or a regular coffee?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "En espresso takk.", "translation": "An espresso, please."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Vil du ha sukker eller melk i espressoen?", "translation": "Do you want sugar or milk in your espresso?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Jeg tar sukkerpilen, takk.", "translation": "I'll take the sugar packet, please."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Her har du espressoen. Kaffen er for varm?", "translation": "Here is your espresso. Is the coffee too hot?"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Nei, den er grei.", "translation": "No, it's fine."},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Bare hyggelig. Ha det!", "translation": "You're welcome. Have a good day!"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Takk, ha det!", "translation": "Thanks, have a good day!"},
        {"speaker": "female-1", "text": "Velkommen tilbake!", "translation": "Welcome back!"},
        {"speaker": "male-1", "text": "Ja, jeg kommer tilbake snart.", "translation": "Yes, I'll be back soon."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Asking for a Different Type of Coffee",
      "lines": [
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Unnskyld, jeg vil gjerne en annen kaffe.", "translation": "Excuse me, I would like a different coffee."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Hva slags kaffe vil du ha?", "translation": "What kind of coffee would you like?"},
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "En cappuccino bitte.", "translation": "A cappuccino, please."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "En cappuccino, ja. Vil du ha sukker eller ikke?", "translation": "A cappuccino, yes. Do you want sugar or not?"},
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Jeg tar sukker, takk.", "translation": "I'll take sugar, please."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Her har du cappuccinoen. Den er ferdig.", "translation": "Here is your cappuccino. It's ready."},
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Takk, den ser utrolig god ut.", "translation": "Thanks, it looks incredibly good."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Ja, vi har gode baristaer her.", "translation": "Yes, we have good baristas here."},
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Det ser ut til det. Jeg kommer tilbake.", "translation": "It seems so. I'll be back."},
        {"speaker": "male-2", "text": "Velkommen tilbake da!", "translation": "Welcome back then!"},
        {"speaker": "female-2", "text": "Ja, jeg gleder meg.", "translation": "Yes, I'm looking forward to it."}
      ]
    }
  ],
